results.question: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    d."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS total_cost,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") / SUM(s."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct,
    COUNT(s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_order_lines
FROM 
    Sales s
JOIN 
    Date d ON s.OrderDateKey = d.DateKey
GROUP BY 
    d."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY 
    d."Fiscal Year";

results.question: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    so.Channel,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) AS total_revenue,
    ROUND(SUM(s.SalesAmount) * 100.0 / SUM(s.SalesAmount) OVER(), 2) AS revenue_share_pct,
    COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS total_orders,
    COUNT(s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS order_lines,
    AVG(s.SalesAmount) AS avg_line_amount,
    ROUND((SUM(s.SalesAmount) - SUM(s.TotalProductCost)) * 100.0 / SUM(s.SalesAmount), 2) AS gross_margin_pct
FROM 
    Sales s
JOIN 
    Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
WHERE 
    so.Channel IN ('Reseller', 'Internet')
GROUP BY 
    so.Channel
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Values list "s" does not have a column named "SalesAmount"

LINE 3:     SUM(s.SalesAmount) AS total_revenue,
                ^

results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    p.Category AS "Category",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM("Sales Amount") FROM Sales) AS "revenue_share_pct",
    SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount")) AS "gross_margin_pct"
FROM 
    Sales s
JOIN 
    Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY 
    p.Category
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC;

results.question: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    p."Product",
    p."Category",
    p."Subcategory",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
    SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") / NULLIF(SUM(s."Sales Amount"), 0)) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM 
    "Product" p
JOIN 
    "Sales" s ON p."ProductKey" = s."ProductKey"
GROUP BY 
    p."Product",
    p."Category",
    p."Subcategory"
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

results.question: Show revenue and units sold broken down by territory group, country, region, and fiscal year. Return columns: Group, Country, Region, Fiscal Year, revenue, units_sold. Sort by Group, Country, Region, then Fiscal Year all ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT st."Group", r."Country-Region" AS Country, st."Region", d."Fiscal Year", 
       SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Sales_Territory" st ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey"
JOIN "Reseller" r ON s."ResellerKey" = r."ResellerKey"
JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
GROUP BY st."Group", r."Country-Region", st."Region", d."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY st."Group" ASC, r."Country-Region" ASC, st."Region" ASC, d."Fiscal Year" ASC;

results.question: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
results.sql:
SELECT c.Customer, c.City, c."State-Province", c."Country-Region",
       COUNT(s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_orders,
       SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS total_line_items,
       SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS total_units,
       SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS lifetime_revenue,
       SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS lifetime_profit
FROM "Customer" c
JOIN "Sales" s ON c.CustomerKey = s.CustomerKey
WHERE c.CustomerKey <> -1
GROUP BY c.Customer, c.City, c."State-Province", c."Country-Region"
ORDER BY lifetime_revenue DESC
LIMIT 15;

results.question: For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    r."Business Type",
    COUNT(DISTINCT r."ResellerKey") AS reseller_count,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") / COUNT(DISTINCT r."ResellerKey") AS revenue_per_reseller,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") / SUM(s."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM 
    "Reseller" r
JOIN 
    "Sales" s ON r."ResellerKey" = s."ResellerKey"
JOIN 
    "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
WHERE 
    so."Channel" = 'Reseller'
GROUP BY 
    r."Business Type"
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;

results.question: Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    Date."Month",
    Date.MonthKey,
    SUM(Sales."Sales Amount") AS monthly_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT Sales_Order."Sales Order") AS orders,
    SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS units_sold
FROM 
    Sales
JOIN Date ON Sales.OrderDateKey = Date.DateKey
JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales."Sales Order Line Key" = Sales_Order."Sales Order Line Key"
GROUP BY 
    Date."Month", Date.MonthKey
ORDER BY 
    Date.MonthKey;
results.error:

                             ^

results.question: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    p.Subcategory AS "Subcategory",
    COUNT(s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS "order_lines",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
    SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "revenue_per_unit",
    AVG(p."List Price") AS "avg_list_price",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") / SUM(s."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS "margin_pct"
FROM 
    "Sales" s
JOIN 
    "Product" p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY 
    p.Subcategory
ORDER BY 
    "revenue" DESC;

results.question: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    so.Channel,
    p.Category,
    d1."Fiscal Year" AS prior_year,
    SUM(s1."Sales Amount") AS prior_revenue,
    d2."Fiscal Year" AS current_year,
    SUM(s2."Sales Amount") AS current_revenue,
    ROUND(((SUM(s2."Sales Amount") - SUM(s1."Sales Amount")) / SUM(s1."Sales Amount") * 100), 2) AS yoy_growth_pct
FROM 
    "Sales" s1
JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s1."Sales Order Line Key" = so."Sales Order Line Key"
JOIN "Product" p ON s1."Product Key" = p."Product Key"
JOIN "Date" d1 ON s1."Order Date Key" = d1."Date Key"
JOIN "Sales" s2 ON s2."Order Date Key" = d1."Date Key"
JOIN "Date" d2 ON s2."Order Date Key" = d2."Date Key"
WHERE 
    d2."Date" - d1."Date" = 10000
GROUP BY 
    so.Channel, p.Category, d1."Fiscal Year", d2."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY 
    so.Channel ASC, p.Category ASC, prior_year ASC;
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Values list "s1" does not have a column named "Sales Order Line Key"

LINE 11: JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s1."Sales Order Line Key" = so."Sales Order Line Key"
                                  ^

results.question: Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.
results.sql:
SELECT Category,
       COUNT(ProductKey) AS product_count,
       AVG("List Price") AS avg_list_price,
       MIN("List Price") AS min_list_price,
       MAX("List Price") AS max_list_price
FROM "Product"
GROUP BY Category
ORDER BY product_count DESC;

results.question: Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.
results.sql:
SELECT "Country-Region", 
       COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller) AS reseller_count, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT "Business Type") AS business_type_count, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT "State-Province") AS state_count
FROM Reseller
GROUP BY "Country-Region"
ORDER BY reseller_count DESC;

results.question: List all distinct product categories. Return columns: Category. Sort by Category ascending.
List all distinct product colors. Return columns: Color. Sort by Color ascending.
List all sales territory regions and their countries. Return columns: Region, Country. Sort by Region ascending.
List all distinct fiscal years. Return columns: Fiscal Year. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
List all distinct sales channels. Return columns: Channel. Sort by Channel ascending.
List all distinct customer countries. Return columns: Country-Region. Sort by Country-Region ascending.
List all distinct reseller business types. Return columns: Business Type. Sort by Business Type ascending.
List all distinct fiscal quarters. Return columns: Fiscal Quarter. Sort by Fiscal Quarter ascending.

Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    so.Channel,
    p.Category AS Category,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit,
    AVG(p."List Price") AS avg_list_price,
    AVG(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS realized_discount_pct,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s.SalesAmount - s."Total Product Cost") / SUM(s.SalesAmount)) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM 
    "Sales" s
JOIN 
    "Product" p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
JOIN 
    "Sales_Order" so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
GROUP BY 
    so.Channel, p.Category
ORDER BY 
    so.Channel ASC, total_revenue DESC;
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Values list "s" does not have a column named "SalesAmount"

                ^

results.question: Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    so.Channel,
    p.Category,
    lag(d."Fiscal Quarter") OVER (PARTITION BY so.Channel, p.Category ORDER BY d."Fiscal Year", d."MonthKey") AS prior_quarter,
    lag(sum(s."Sales Amount")) OVER (PARTITION BY so.Channel, p.Category ORDER BY d."Fiscal Year", d."MonthKey") AS prior_revenue,
    d."Fiscal Quarter" AS current_quarter,
    sum(s."Sales Amount") AS current_revenue,
    (sum(s."Sales Amount") - lag(sum(s."Sales Amount")) OVER (PARTITION BY so.Channel, p.Category ORDER BY d."Fiscal Year", d."MonthKey")) / lag(sum(s."Sales Amount")) OVER (PARTITION BY so.Channel, p.Category ORDER BY d."Fiscal Year", d."MonthKey") * 100 AS qoq_growth_pct
FROM 
    "Sales" s
JOIN 
    "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
JOIN 
    "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
JOIN 
    "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
GROUP BY 
    so.Channel, p.Category, d."Fiscal Quarter", d."Fiscal Year", d."MonthKey"
ORDER BY 
    so.Channel, p.Category, prior_quarter;

results.question: For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT Category,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY Category ORDER BY SUM(SalesAmount) DESC) AS revenue_rank,
       Subcategory,
       SUM(SalesAmount) AS revenue,
       SUM(OrderQuantity) AS units_sold,
       SUM(SalesAmount - TotalProductCost) AS gross_profit,
       (SUM(SalesAmount) / SUM(SUM(SalesAmount)) OVER(PARTITION BY Category)) * 100 AS category_revenue_share_pct
FROM Product
JOIN Sales ON Product.ProductKey = Sales.ProductKey
GROUP BY Category, Subcategory
ORDER BY Category ASC, revenue_rank ASC, Subcategory ASC;
results.error:

                                                                       ^

results.question: Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT Sales_Order.Channel, Product.Category, 
       SUM(Sales.SalesAmount) AS revenue,
       100.0 * SUM(Sales.SalesAmount) / SUM(SUM(Sales.SalesAmount)) OVER(PARTITION BY Sales_Order.Channel) AS channel_revenue_share_pct,
       SUM(SUM(Sales.SalesAmount)) OVER(PARTITION BY Sales_Order.Channel ORDER BY SUM(Sales.SalesAmount) DESC) / SUM(SUM(Sales.SalesAmount)) OVER(PARTITION BY Sales_Order.Channel) AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct,
       COUNT(DISTINCT Sales.SalesOrder) AS orders,
       SUM(Sales.SalesAmount - Product.TotalProductCost) AS gross_profit
FROM Sales
JOIN Product ON Sales.ProductKey = Product.ProductKey
JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales.SalesOrderLineKey = Sales_Order.SalesOrderLineKey
GROUP BY Sales_Order.Channel, Product.Category
ORDER BY Sales_Order.Channel ASC, revenue DESC, Product.Category ASC;

                   ^

results.question: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT t."Group", d."Fiscal Year", 
       t.top_channel, t.channel_revenue, t.group_year_revenue, 
       ROUND(t.channel_revenue * 100.0 / t.group_year_revenue, 2) AS channel_revenue_share_pct
FROM (
    SELECT "Group", "Fiscal Year", 
           MAX(channel) AS top_channel, 
           MAX(channel_revenue) AS channel_revenue, 
           SUM(channel_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY "Group", "Fiscal Year") AS group_year_revenue
    FROM (
        SELECT st."Group", d."Fiscal Year", so."Channel" AS channel, 
               SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
        FROM "Sales" s
        JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
        JOIN "Sales_Territory" st ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey"
        JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
        GROUP BY st."Group", d."Fiscal Year", so."Channel"
    ) sub
    GROUP BY "Group", "Fiscal Year", channel_revenue
) t
JOIN (
    SELECT "Group", "Fiscal Year", 
           MAX(channel) AS top_channel, 
           MAX(channel_revenue) AS channel_revenue, 
           SUM(channel_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY "Group", "Fiscal Year") AS group_year_revenue
    FROM (
        SELECT st."Group", d."Fiscal Year", so."Channel" AS channel, 
               SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
        FROM "Sales" s
        JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
        JOIN "Sales_Territory" st ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey"
        JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
        GROUP BY st."Group", d."Fiscal Year", so."Channel"
    ) sub
    GROUP BY "Group", "Fiscal Year", channel_revenue
) t2 ON t."Group" = t2."Group" AND t."Fiscal Year" = t2."Fiscal Year" AND t.channel_revenue = t2.channel_revenue
ORDER BY t."Group", d."Fiscal Year";

                          ^
